name: federation-mcp-server
description: MCP server for vacation rental direct bookings. Full lifecycle: search, quote, Stripe checkout, status, reschedule, cancel. Supports seasonal pricing, guest-count tiers, weekly/biweekly packages, gap-night discounts, and host-controlled federation discounts.

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Supabase service role key (secret, full database access)

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.description: Stripe secret key for payment processing (required for checkout/cancel/reschedule)
